hero.title: Strong Women. Supportive Space. Real Results.
hero.subtitle: A welcoming fitness studio designed for women who want to move confidently.

home.about_body: Ar-Re Women's Fitness is a modern fitness studio built for women of all experience levels. We believe movement should feel empowering, accessible, and personal.
home.hero_title: Strong Women. Supportive Space. Real Results.
home.hero_subtitle: A welcoming fitness studio designed for women who want to move confidently.
home.metric2_text: From first session to confident routine
home.metric3_text: Fitness, mobility, and a calm studio atmosphere
home.features_title: Programs built for strength, confidence, and balance
home.features_subtitle: Every part of the studio is designed to feel calm, modern, and encouraging while still helping members train with structure and purpose.
home.classes_title: Choose a class that fits your goals
home.classes_subtitle: From energising sessions to slower, more restorative training, members can find a rhythm that works for their body and routine.
home.guided_by_community_text: Friendly coaching and a supportive women-only atmosphere.
home.designed_to_feel_calm_text: A polished, welcoming space that still feels energising and strong.

about.title: A women's fitness studio designed to feel strong and welcoming
about.subtitle: Ar-Re blends structure, encouragement, and wellbeing so members can build routines that feel sustainable, energising, and genuinely enjoyable.
about.studio_description: Ar-Re Women's Fitness is a modern fitness studio built for women of all experience levels. We believe movement should feel empowering, accessible, and personal.
about.description1: Our studio is intentionally calm, modern, and approachable. Whether someone is taking their very first class or returning to training with new goals, the experience should feel supportive from the moment they walk through the door.
about.mission_text: Help women feel stronger in their bodies, more confident in their routines, and more connected to a positive fitness community.
about.approach1: Friendly coaching for all levels and experience ranges
about.approach2: Progressive classes that balance challenge with confidence-building
about.approach3: A women-only environment focused on comfort, support, and community
about.approach4: A holistic blend of fitness, mobility, and long-term wellbeing

contact.title: Let's help you get started
contact.subtitle: Reach out with questions about memberships, classes, your first visit, or the best place to begin. We'll help you find the right fit.
contact.send_message_description: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll get back to you.

contact-form.message_placeholder: Tell us a little about what you're looking for
contact-form.success_message: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact-form.error_message: There was a problem sending your message. Please try again.
